name: noyona/customer-reviews
title: Customer Reviews Grid
description: Responsive customer reviews section with review cards and CTA links.

default.name: Lorem L.
default.title: Stays on all day!
default.content: Absolutely love this lipstick! The color is vibrant and it really stays on all day without drying my lips. I wore it to a wedding and didn't have to touch up once.
